Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Dfs' Discovery Subpoenas & For Protective Order
Off Calendar Feb-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Stephen R. Jaffe, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Darlene Ash
Sana Swe, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Barclays Golobal Investor, Inc.

AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Darlene Ash's motion to quash subpoenas. The motion is granted as to the subpoenas for employment records. As to the records of plaintiff's physician, the motion is granted in part and denied in part. The subpoena is modified to only require production of records from January 1, 2006 to July 5, 2006. In addition, as to categories (a) and (b), the deponent may redact the records to exclude any information concerning the purpose of any consultation and any treatment, diagnosis, or medication prescribed. The deponent shall produce records that describe the dates and times of any appointments and when was the predicted due date. The deponent is ordered to produce documents responsive to categories (c) and (e). The motion is denied as to category (d).
COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2008 Set For Trial On Jul-21-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-02-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 210

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2007 Off Calendar

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Text Ruling
